buildCommand: cd ../.. && npx convex deploy --cmd-url-env-var-name VITE_CONVEX_URL --cmd 'pnpm --filter web build'

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://vercel.live; img-src 'self' https://*.convex.cloud data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://*.convex.cloud https://*.convex.site wss://*.convex.cloud https://vercel.live wss://vercel.live blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
